session_note: S84 — user-queued 2-priority batch ahead of backlog work: (P1) pooped-cruiser grab gate — while a player's spark is pooped and trailing, the cruiser must NOT be able to grab primitives until the spark catches up; (P2) RAINBOW FLYOVER event — on rainbow-click switches, a dumb-looking rainbow character with a crooked tooth arcs left-to-right across the screen yelling a stupid voice line ('gnyaaaahngniiinghyouuu') while the whole background pulses colorful/trippy bright lights for the switch duration. User directive: 'Make it happen! be creative technical and thorough! then push it so i can check it out today', then CHECK/ANALYZE + /handoff. Model: Fable 5 (user-sanctioned S82/S83 precedent).
council_result: R1 Trident Strike (Grok 4.20 reasoning: 8-item review, 5 challenges; Gemini 2.5-pro: APPROVE + 3 challenges) -> Claude synthesis. Battle Ledger 8 rows: P1 gate ships (Grok alternatives overruled 2.0>1.75), P2 sync design CHANGED by A.0 probe (one-shot effects lose ~5/6 cross-wire at 10Hz sampling vs per-frame wipe) -> synced rainbowSwitchTick field (additive-optional, S82 poopedUntilTick precedent, no schema bump); Gemini stacking/mid-join specs adopted; shader+RNG-arc alternatives rejected. PRIME-AUDIT delta documented in PDR. PDR: .claude/plans-archive/2026-06-10_PDR_S84_pooped-grab_rainbow-flyover_IN-PROGRESS.md. priorities.label: S84 P1 — POOPED-CRUISER PICKUP GATE: while poop-debuffed, PICKUP_SPARK requires avatar arrival within POOP_PICKUP_ARRIVAL_RADIUS of the spark
priorities.objective: Pooped players' cursors must not grab free sparks at full mouse speed; the 7px/tick chasing avatar must physically arrive first. Silent reject + diagnostics counter; host-authoritative; zero wire change.
priorities.testing: reject-far / allow-near / allow-after-expiry / allow-not-pooped / counter increment; full vitest + tsc
priorities.check_method: S84 P1 (commit 3feb7ef): gate inserted in applyPickupSpark AFTER the remote reach check, BEFORE fsmPickup commit — isCruiserDebuffed(player, world.tick) && distSq(spark.pos, avatarPos) > POOP_PICKUP_ARRIVAL_RADIUS(36)^2 -> raceRejects++ + NEW rejectReasons.pickupPoopedTooFar++ + silent return (race-reject precedent S42/S48). Import-cycle check done: gameMode.ts imports world.ts TYPE-ONLY so sparkLifecycle->gameMode edge creates no runtime cycle. Gate is a pure function of synced fields (poopedUntilTick + avatarPos + spark.pos all ride NetSnapshot) so optimistic client dispatch and host-authoritative dispatch agree by construction (Grok desync challenge resolved). Boundary semantics: > comparison means distSq==R^2 counts as arrived; radius 36 > 2 chase steps (7px) prevents click-vs-dispatch oscillation. GATES: 5 new unit tests (reject-far w/ cursor ON spark proving avatar-keyed; allow-near 14.1px; exact-boundary 36px allowed; expired-debuff ungated; un-pooped far ungated = pre-S84 behavior) — suite 20/20; FULL vitest 1252/1252; tsc clean. Live-behavior verification deferred to the P2 combined preview smoke + CI e2e lane on 3feb7ef (logged, not dropped).

priorities.label: S84 P2 — RAINBOW FLYOVER EVENT: synced rainbowSwitchTick field drives crooked-tooth rainbow L->R arc + trippy background + TTS dumb-voice yell on all peers
priorities.objective: On rainbow color-switch: flyover character (Imagen4+matte) arcs left-to-right over RAINBOW_FLYOVER_DURATION_TICKS=240 yelling a pitch-warped TTS nonsense line, background pulses trippy hue-cycled light (alpha<=0.30, no strobe). Reliable on both peers via additive-optional synced field.
priorities.scope: worldTypes/world.ts, rainbowLifecycle.ts, save.ts, audioManager.ts, rainbowFlyoverRenderer.ts (new), main.ts, constants.ts, public assets (PNG+OGG), tests + e2e extension
priorities.testing: switchTick set/restart; snapshot round-trip + back-compat; audio single-fire freshness; flyoverPose determinism; full vitest + tsc + bundle charter; live preview; post-push CI + live URL probes

a0_probes.ci_on_tip: E2E SUCCESS + Deploy SUCCESS on 2b3a4b5; live site 200

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #recon-agents-map-the-wrong-verb #users-speak-in-avatars-not-actions: the recon agent read 'grab the primitives' as PLACE (the action that consumes a carried spark) because placement is where the existing validation blocks live — but the user's sentence structure ('until spark doesnt get to them he shouldnt be able to grab THEM') named the TARGET of the grab, and free sparks are what you grab. Reading applyPickupSpark directly settled it in one file: the only reach check was remote-only and cursor-keyed, so the debuff provably never bit for collecting. LESSON: when a user phrase maps to two candidate actions, diff the CANDIDATE VALIDATION PATHS — the bug lives where the check is MISSING, not where checks already exist. Second: the gate had to key on synced-field purity (poopedUntilTick/avatarPos/spark.pos) so optimistic and authoritative dispatch agree by construction — same construction S82 used for the cursor-target write.
session_status: S84 OPEN — recon in flight; PDR pending Council deliberation
